top_signals.title: Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered 'muscle trucks' despite high gas prices
top_signals.summary: Stellantis plans to launch a new lineup of what it's calling "muscle trucks" for its Ram brand despite elevated U.S. gas prices due to the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Low Dollar Volatility Forces FX Traders Into Carry, Value
top_signals.summary: A sharp drop in volatility in the US dollar is pushing traders in the $9.5-trillion-a-day currency market toward carry wagers and bets on relative value in search of profits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia’s Huang bankrolls AI boom with $90bn deal spree
top_signals.summary: Chipmaker’s spending rivals Big Tech’s biggest venture operations, tying customers and start-ups to its technology
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
